results.rendered_html:
ahārya (3. a + hārya)
1〉 adj.
a〉 was nicht fortgenommen, entzogen [Page1-0574] werden kann oder darf  H. an. 3,480 .  MED. y. 69 . ahāryaṃ brāhmaṇadravyaṃ rājñā nityamiti sthitiḥ  M. 9,189 . Davon nom. abstr. ˚ryatva  HIT.   PR. 4 .
— b〉 unbestechlich: paricārakaiḥ  M. 7,217 .
— 2〉 m. Berg  AK. 2,3,1 .  H. 1027 . an.   MED.

results.rendered_html:
aharaṇīya, ahārya a.
1 Not to be stolen, removed, or taken away; ahāryaṃ brāhmaṇadravyaṃ rājñāṃ nityamiti sthitiḥ  Ms. 9. 189. 
2 Not to be won over (by fraud), devoted, loyal;  Ms. 7. 217. 
3 Firm, unflinching, inexorable; ˚niścayā  Dk. 41 ,  Ku. 5. 8. 
— ryaḥ A mountain; ˚tā,
— tvaṃ not being liable to be taken away, security;  H. Pr. 4.
